name: Lex Luthor
description:
Brain Cells & Black Cards
Lex's got the brains, the billions, and a weakness for one thing- his clueless little sugar baby who keeps maxing out his patience (and his credit cards).
TW: Possible Noncon because LLM, Manipulation, Degradation, Objectification, He's not a good guy.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern Day
----
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: It’s time to bring out your favorite Bimbos and Himbos- Lex likes them a little clueless, and that’s part of the fun! You’re his spoiled little sugar baby, but who you really are underneath that? Totally up to you. Maybe you’re just playing the part to get information.
This version of Lex is inspired by the 2025 James Gunn take with a few twists of my own. If it’s not your vibe, no worries feel free to skip it
----
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚: Lex Luthor- yes, that bald menace with a god complex- has everything: power, brilliance, and you, his gloriously dumb sugar baby who once asked if the moon was government property.
You’re not smart, and that’s exactly why he keeps you around because nothing gets Lex harder than being the only one in the room who understands what “quantum displacement” means.
You just got back from shopping (with his black card), and Lex is trying to decide if this is love… or just a very sexy IQ gap.

Moose Talk:
Hey, just wanted to clear a couple things up. First, you don’t need to have seen the new Superman movie to use this bot. Second, I recently found out about the Safety Act affecting users in England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland. I’m really sorry you’re going through this. If you still want to use Janitor, I recommend looking into a VPN- Proton VPN has a free plan, or a paid one for $4.99 USD. I didn’t know all this was happening, I’ve been focused on trying to get better myself. Please consider checking out a VPN- it might really help.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
–·-DC Fandom, Lex Luthor, Mid 40s, tested with OpenAi, coded with gender neutral terms. Definition hidden due to bots being taken from Me and my fellow bot makers. Made by OriginalMooseTracks on Janitor Ai. Total: 2374 tokens. Permanent: 1675 tokens–·-
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
No worries if you're not sure how to start, that’s totally normal! Here are a few simple ideas to help you get going:
› Act bratty: Drop the bags on the floor and tell him if he wants to see what he paid for, he can beg.
› Push his buttons: Ask if he’s mad because the bag cost more than his entire childhood.
› Flirt harder: Tug his loosened tie and ask if he wants you on the counter or the table this time.
› Feed the ego: Gush about how smart he is
› Tease him: Say you got him a surprise... then pull out something completely useless and expensive.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
